name: polaron_healing_length
app_r_label: Polaron healing length ξ = ℏc/(α² m_e c²)
formula: ξ = ℏc/(α² m_e c²) = a_0/α (single value; no manuscript-derivable O(1) prefactor)
tier: Tier 1 textbook (Bohr-Compton ξ = a_0/α); GCT-internal Route 2 closed negatively under O.25; lumen identification = Tier 3
app_r_precision_str: ξ(CODATA α) = 7.252 nm (+0.02% vs stated 7.25 nm); ξ(GCT bare α) = 7.302 nm (+0.71%); inter-branch agreement 0.69%

extra.derivation_note: Standard Gross-Pitaevskii healing-length formula applied to the Compton-Bohr lengthscale: ξ = ℏc/(α²m_ec²) = a_0/α. The formula has no manuscript-derivable O(1) prefactor; both CODATA α and GCT bare α = φ²/360 inputs give the same ξ ≈ 7.25 nm to within ~0.7% (the formula is α-input-insensitive at the percent level since the two α values differ by ~0.35% and the difference enters ξ as a square). Microtubule lumen identification: 2ξ = 14.5 nm vs lumen ID 15 nm = 3% match (Tier 3 biological correlation per Ch07 §7.3.3).
